fields.description: Pick one mode. "Record not saved" hides the button while the root doc has no saved name. "Record saved" hides once a name exists. "SQL expression" hides when the query returns a truthy first column.
fields.label: Hide If
fields.options:
Never
Record not saved
Record saved
SQL expression

fields.description: Single SELECT; hide the button when the first column of the first row is truthy. Bind %(name)s to the root document name. Use {{t:DocType Name}} for tables (expands to the real tablename without typing the tab prefix).
fields.label: Hide If SQL
